outline.title: Pillar 1: Conversational AI & WhatsApp Intelligence

outline.summary: Recommendations for moving from reactive service to proactive relationship management using AI.

outline.summary: Recommendations for a white-labeled client portal, digital vault, and live trip tracking.

outline.title: Pillar 5: Supplier & Booking System Integration
outline.summary: Recommendations for integrating GDS, hotel APIs, and automated commission tracking.

outline.title: Pillar 6: The Lanai Intelligence Engine
outline.summary: Vision for a proactive AI advisor providing morning briefings, opportunity spotting, and relationship memory.

outline.title: Live CRM Integration — Now Implemented
outline.summary: All advisor portal pages (Clients, Travel Requests, Members) are now wired to live Twenty CRM data via GraphQL, replacing mock data with 1,200 real client records and 150 pipeline opportunities.

outline.title: Client Portal — Now Live at /client
outline.summary: A dedicated client-facing portal at /client with secure PIN login, trip itinerary view, travel request submission form, and WhatsApp quick-connect — no advisor sidebar, fully branded.

outline.title: Streaming Proposal Co-Pilot — Word-by-Word AI Output
outline.summary: The Proposal Co-Pilot now streams output word-by-word via SSE from Ollama, with a toggle between Streaming (live markdown) and Structured (JSON sections) modes, plus a Stop button for control.

outline.title: Implementation Roadmap
outline.summary: Phased roadmap from H1 (Enhance) to H3 (Innovate) with investment levels and guiding principles.
